name: pitch
description: Synced presentation assets for KSUM Idea Grant, AgriNext/KERA, and GAAM Demo Day. All content aligns with `docs/01`–`07` and the live MVP.

scripts.build: marp --no-stdin pitch-deck.md --pdf -o pitch-deck.pdf && marp --no-stdin pitch-deck.md --pptx -o pitch-deck.pptx && marp --no-stdin pitch-deck.md --html -o pitch-deck-marp.html
